name: Federal Register MCP
primary_use: Track published federal rules and notices relevant to PR agencies
notes: Official publication of record; strong provenance via document ID and date.

name: Federal Regulations MCP
notes: Complements Federal Register MCP with in-force regulation text.

name: SAM.gov Contracts MCP
primary_use: Federal contractor/award registration lookup for MoneySweep
notes: Requires SAM.gov API key; coverage of PR-based entities needs validation.

name: USAspending Adapter
primary_use: Federal spending/award data for MoneySweep contracts capability

name: Geospatial Geocoding MCP
primary_use: Address and place-name geocoding for spatial capability
notes: PR fit depends on provider's PR address coverage; verify per-vendor.

name: Terrain Elevation MCP
notes: USGS-derived sources generally cover PR at coarser resolution.

name: Weather MCP
primary_use: Current conditions and forecast for weather capability
notes: NOAA-backed sources fit PR well; commercial ones vary.

name: Provenance Content Registry MCP
primary_use: Content-addressable provenance ledger for adapter outputs
notes: Supports the provenance capability's lineage requirements directly.

name: Governance Policy Gate MCP
primary_use: Runtime policy-gate enforcement for read_only/write_policy rules
notes: No runtime exists yet to consume this; tracked for the future runtime phase.

name: AIS Logistics MCP
primary_use: Vessel/AIS tracking relevant to port and logistics observation
notes: Coverage and PR-specific fit not yet validated.

name: Parcel Zoning Flood MCP
primary_use: Parcel/zoning/flood overlay data for Spiderweb-class capabilities
notes: Flood-layer fit for PR municipalities needs a validation pass.

name: Generic Paid API Marketplace
primary_use: Catch-all marketplace aggregating many third-party APIs
notes: Low authority and weak provenance; broad write-risk surface across bundled APIs.

name: Personal GPS Location MCP
primary_use: Individual/personal device GPS location for field-ops
notes: Carries personal-location privacy risk and requires credential material this registry will not hold; rejected per hard-block rules.
